title: Boat Container
description: Wanna put chests, enderchests and furnaces?? into boats?
body:
![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/864603904728629299/1017104827316174858/Boat-Container-9-7-2022_2.png)

<center>

[![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/895334913560178698/915683006872698960/RequiresFabric.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)

[![Downloads](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_526274_downloads.svg?badge_style=for_the_badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-an-end-anchor)
[![Versions](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/526274.svg?badge_style=for_the_badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-an-end-anchor)

</center>

 

## Features
- This mod adds Chest, Enderchest and Furnace Boats into the game ( Mod was created before 1.19 :P )
- They can be crafted by putting a chest or an enderchest together with a boat into the crafting table and
  can be accessed by sneak + right click.
- When destroyed they will drop the boat and the chest, furnace or obsidian (unless broken with silktouch) separately
- Furnace Boats can be filled with coal to be almost twice as fast as normal boats

 

#### Chest and Enderchest Boat Items are automatically generated for every boat existing, so please report if any modded boats don't have a proper item texture. Thanks!

 

### 1.19+ Versions dont include crafting recipes and creative tab items for chest boats!

 

## Compatibilities
- [More Banner Features](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-banner-features) - By KxmischesDomi
- [Twigs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twigs) - By ninnih_ & stephpsi

 

## Supported Languages
- English
- German
- Portuguese (Brazil)
- Polish
- Russian
